== G3-machine  machines + oracle ==
  warn   Portfolio.machine.json: liveness for reverted rests on an UNPROVEN _exhaustive claim (guards are erased in the TLA+ model, so TLC cannot check it); verify the guard set is provably total, or add an unguarded fallback branch so the liveness proof becomes sound
  note   Portfolio.machine.json: state reverted always-list is fully guarded; liveness rests on the declared exhaustiveness: prior is set by every setPending action to the review stage the operation departed from; its codomain is exactly the four PortfolioStatus values, so one guarded branch per stage is total
  checked: 3 machines, 33 transitions, 3 oracles fresh, 31 named units covered, 1 states relying on unproven _exhaustive liveness

  note   Portfolio: 3 operational-overlay states (committing, commitRetry, reverted)
